pokemon:spectrier.name: Spectrier
pokemon:spectrier.summary: As it dashes through the night, Spectrier absorbs the life-force of sleeping creatures. It craves silence and solitude.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: As it dashes through the night, Spectrier absorbs the life-force of sleeping creatures. It craves silence and solitude.
It probes its surroundings with all its senses save one—it doesn’t use its sense of sight. Spectrier’s kicks are said to separate soul from body.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: As it dashes through the night, Spectrier absorbs the life-force of sleeping creatures. It craves silence and solitude.
